name: Rainbow Raditore with Chicken, Broccoli, Red Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil pasta until tender (4-6 minutes), rinse immediately with cold water.
2. Add 1 tablespoon olive oil to the cooled pasta.
3. In a blender, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, marinated artichokes, parmesan cheese, lemon juice, and garlic. Blend until smooth.
4. In a large bowl, combine the pasta and the remaining 5 ingredients (sour cream mixture, chicken, broccoli, red bell pepper, sliced olives, fresh basil). Toss together with the dressing.
